title: teline eriocarpa
intro: Teline eriocarpa, also known as Scotch broom, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and western Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Teline eriocarpa include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as a natural diuretic. Teline eriocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and anxiety.
